name: Greek-Style Lamb Burgers with Minted Yogurt Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons shredded fresh mint leaves, or to taste
1/2 cup finely chopped pitted Kalamata olives (12 to 15)
2 small green bell peppers, cut into rings
recipeInstructions:
Make yogurt sauce: Mince and mash the garlic with the salt. Drain the yogurt in a sieve lined with a dampened paper towel set over a bowl for 30 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and combine with the garlic and mint.
Prepare grill and oil rack. Set grill 5-6 inches from coals. In a bowl, gently combine the lamb, feta, and olives. Form into 6 patties about 1-inch thick. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Grill for about 7 minutes per side for medium-rare.
Split the pitas to form a pocket. Transfer burgers to pita pockets and top with tomatoes, bell peppers, and onion. Serve burgers with yogurt sauce.
Yield: 6 servings
